creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
Created attachment 239038
Update to 2.9.0

Update gnustep-make to the latest 2.9.0
Full changelog can be found here:

https://github.com/gnustep/tools-make/releases/tag/make-2_9_0

I changed the Makefile to satisfy portclippy
Also, since ftp.gnustep.org was unresponsive, I switched to GH for the sources (same as gnustep-base, actually).

I have no idea how many projects use this, so it might possibly have a lot of impact on other projects.
The only ports I tested this with are gnustep-base (I will also open a PR to update that port) as well as devel/sope and www/sogo.
